title: neltuma chilensis var. catamarcana
intro: Neltuma chilensis var. catamarcana, also known as Catamarca neltuma, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Neltuma genus. Traditionally used in folk medicine, this plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Its medicinal properties make it beneficial for various health issues, including its ability to help reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, Neltuma chilensis var. catamarcana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
